studyName: Epigenetic and Genetic Profiling in Lymphoma

tables.description: Sample ID, organ or tissue from which sample was collected, specific site of sample, analyte type, tumor status, age at the time sample was collected, chemotherapy or radiotherapy prior to sample collection, lymphoma subgroup for study purposes, and clinical diagnostic classification of tumor by WHO 2008 criteria of participants with B-cell lymphoma and involved in the "Detection of Enhancer-Associated Rearrangements Reveals Mechanisms of Oncogene Dysregulation in B-cell Lymphoma" project.

variables.name: AGE_AT_BIOPSY
variables.description: Patient's age at the time sample was collected

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Whether sample represents malignant lymphoid tissue

variables.name: ORGAN_TISSUE
variables.description: Organ or tissue from which sample was collected

variables.name: PRIOR_TREATMENT
variables.description: Indicates lymphoma-directed chemotherapy or radiotherapy prior to sample collection

variables.name: WHO_CLASS
variables.description: Clinical diagnostic classification of tumor by WHO 2008 criteria

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, sample source, source sample ID, and sample use variable obtained from participants with B-cell lymphoma and involved in the "Detection of Enhancer-Associated Rearrangements Reveals Mechanisms of Oncogene Dysregulation in B-cell Lymphoma" project.

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, subject source, and source subject ID of participants with B-cell lymphoma and involved in the "Detection of Enhancer-Associated Rearrangements Reveals Mechanisms of Oncogene Dysregulation in B-cell Lymphoma" project.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: Subject ID and gender of participants with B-cell lymphoma and involved in the "Detection of Enhancer-Associated Rearrangements Reveals Mechanisms of Oncogene Dysregulation in B-cell Lymphoma" project.
